title: TargetServer
description: Configuration for a backend target server.

name.description: Required. Name of the target server.

host.description: Required. Hostname or IP address of the backend service.

port.description: Required. Port number of the backend service.

isEnabled.description: Whether the target server is enabled.

protocol.description: Protocol used to communicate with the target.

description.description: Optional description of the target server.
